title: Custom POS Giftcards
description: Where can I obtain bulk, customizable gift cards that are compatible with Easy Commerce point‑of‑sale software?
narrative: The user is looking for suppliers offering pre‑printed gift cards in bulk (e.g., packs of 100 or 500) that can be used with the Easy Commerce suite (Easy Resto, Easy Boulangerie, Easy Livraison, etc.). Relevant information should describe the card dimensions, barcode format, denomination breakdown (e.g., €10, €20, €50, €100), options for holiday or themed designs, and the ability to personalize the front or back with the business name. Documents that detail these specific features, pack sizes, and integration with the Easy Commerce software are considered relevant. Content that only mentions generic thank‑you cards, unrelated gift‑card platforms, mobile apps, or unrelated promotional materials should be treated as non‑relevant.

title: Regional Food Campaigns
description: What examples exist of integrated communication strategies used to promote regional French food products?
narrative: The user is looking for case studies, descriptions, and materials (e.g., storytelling, digital strategy, signage, advertising, print collateral) that illustrate how regional food brands in France (such as Pyrenean Milk Lamb, Luz Ardiden, Grand Tourmalet, local farms, etc.) have been marketed and communicated to consumers. Relevant documents should detail the development of communication plans, branding concepts, digital presence, press kits, and promotional events for these regional products. Documents that focus solely on unrelated restaurants, generic travel listings, or non‑food topics are not relevant.

title: Lotus Hybrid Feasibility
description: What are the technical specifications, cost factors, and environmental impacts of the Lotus EVE Hybrid concept presented at the Geneva motor show?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on the Lotus EVE Hybrid concept car, including its powertrain (1.6‑L engine, 30 kW electric motor, CVT, regenerative braking), expected price or cost‑saving measures, claimed CO₂ emission reduction, and how its technology compares to established hybrids such as the Toyota Prius. Relevant documents should describe the design goals (Efficient, Viable, Environmental), the low‑cost CVT solution, the hybrid’s market positioning (low‑cost family sedan), and any analysis of whether the project is a genuine commercial effort or primarily a publicity stunt. Non‑relevant material includes unrelated Lotus parts discussions, forum posts about wheel centres, or generic automotive news unrelated to the EVE Hybrid.

title: JC Farm Poultry
description: Where can I buy open‑air farm‑raised poultry from the JC Farm in Le Grand‑Serre, and what products, market locations and sales times are offered?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information about the JC Farm (La Ferme de JC) in Le Grand‑Serre, Drôme, including the types of poultry sold (whole birds, fillets, sausages, paupiettes, etc.), the open‑air rearing methods, on‑farm sales hours, and the specific market days and venues where the farm’s products are available (e.g., Valence, Saint‑Jean, Saint‑Jean‑en‑Royans, Saint‑Marcellin). Relevant documents should mention the farm’s location, contact details, product range, and market schedules. Documents about unrelated restaurants, packaged meat products, or generic recipes are not relevant.

title: Window Tint Regulations
description: What are the legal requirements and performance characteristics for front and rear automotive window tint films in France?
narrative: The user is looking for information on French vehicle window‑tint legislation (e.g., minimum visible light transmission for front windows, permissible tint levels for rear windows) as well as technical details of tint products such as solar/athermal films, UV and heat reduction percentages, and installation kits (e.g., pre‑cut kits for specific models like the Peugeot 307). Relevant documents must discuss the law enacted in 2017, film specifications, protective benefits, and fitting procedures. Documents about hotels, scooter covers, or unrelated consumer goods are not relevant.

title: Jute Sailboat Voyage
description: What are the origins, construction details, and Atlantic crossing story of the Tara Tari jute‑fiber sailboat?
narrative: The user is looking for information about the Tara Tari project—a small fishing sailboat built primarily from jute fibers in Bangladesh, its ecological and social motivations, and the personal narrative of Capucine Trochet's Atlantic crossing as presented in her TEDxChampsElyseesWomen 2013 talk. Relevant documents should mention Tara Tari, jute‑based construction, the Bangladesh shipyard, the Atlantic crossing, and the speaker’s experience; documents focusing on unrelated medical topics, generic boat type listings, or unrelated spiritual content are not relevant.

description: What are the CO2 emissions and fuel‑efficiency figures for used SsangYong cars under the new WLTP energy‑label system?

title: Organic Potato Varieties

narrative: The user is looking for information on organic potato varieties that combine good agronomic performance (e.g., resistance to downy mildew, late blight, and other common potato diseases) with particular culinary qualities (e.g., firm flesh for salads, soft flesh for fries or gratins). title: Ego Transcendence
description: What practices and teachings help a person move beyond the egoic mind toward a higher state of consciousness?
narrative: The user is seeking material that explains how the egoic mind functions, why it creates suffering, and what methods (e.g., mindfulness, non‑reaction, spiritual insight) can be used to dissolve ego identification. Relevant documents discuss Eckhart Tolle’s concepts of the ego, the inner ‘new heaven’, collective consciousness, and techniques such as observing the voice in the head, non‑judgmental awareness, and forgiveness. A relevant document should address the nature of egoic patterns, the role of complaining and resentment, and provide guidance for attaining a more awakened, ego‑free awareness. Documents focused on unrelated topics (e.g., video‑game forums, biblical creation narratives, or unrelated theological Q&A) are not relevant.

title: Workplace Mental Disability

Documents unrelated to mental health, employment, or workplace integration—such as event listings, TV programming guides, fiction blogs, or gaming forums—are not relevant.

narrative: The user is looking for information on the toxic compounds that develop in potatoes as they turn green, sprout, or rot (e.g., solanine and other glycoalkaloids), the potential health effects of ingesting or inhaling these compounds, and practical advice on how to handle, store, or discard affected potatoes safely. title: Lincoln Labor Ideology
